impact.title: Company Deletion Impact Summary
impact.description: Company deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. This deletion will affect the business units under it.

summary.unit_count: Business units that will be deleted: {totalBusinessUnit} linked business units.

confirm.title: Confirm Company Deletion
confirm.description: To proceed, type the company name below as confirmation that you understand this action cannot be undone.
confirm.approval_text: I understand that deleting this company is permanent and cannot be undone.

banner.title: Information!
banner.description: All related data will be deleted and cannot be restored. This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

input.label: Company Name
input.placeholder: Type the company name to confirm deletion

active_units.description: Some business units in this company are still active. Deactivate them first before continuing.

default_company.description: This company cannot be deleted because it is currently set as the default company. Please change the default company first if you still want to delete this company.

error.title: Failed to Check Deletion Impact
error.message: Company data could not be verified for deletion. Please try again.
error.unknown: Something went wrong while checking company deletion impact.

success.title: Company Deleted
success.message: Company has been removed from the list.

error.company_has_transaction: Company cannot be deleted because it has transactions
error.unit_has_transaction: Company cannot be deleted because its business units have transactions
error.company_name_required: Company name is required to proceed with deletion
error.has_active_units: Company cannot be deleted because it still has active business units.
error.is_default: Default company cannot be deleted. Change default company first.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to delete this company.
error.validation_error: Delete confirmation validation failed. Please check your input.
error.unknown: Something went wrong while deleting the company.
